query: Find & host online support groups that actually fill up alternative

results.title: Free Online Peer Support Groups | ShareWell
results.content:
## What Are Online Support Groups?

An online support group is a small, live video conversation among people who are facing the same kind of life challenge. Members take turns sharing what's going on, asking questions, and listening. A Peer Host keeps the conversation respectful and on-topic, and most groups run between 30 and 90 minutes.

Online support groups are different from therapy and different from internet forums. They're not led by a clinician, and they're not async text threads. They're real-time human conversation, hosted on video, with people who actually understand what you're going through because they've been through it too. [...] Goal
:   Goal setting, accountability, performance

Best for
:   Specific goals, life transitions, professional growth

Limits
:   Not regulated; quality varies

## How to Find the Right Online Support Group

Not every group is the right fit, and that's okay. Here's what to look for so your first session is the start of something that actually helps.

1. 1

   ### Match the topic to what you're going through

   Generic "mental health" groups can feel scattered. A group focused on the specific thing you're navigating, grief, divorce, ADHD, narcissistic abuse, keeps the conversation relevant.
2. 2

   ### Check who is hosting the group [...] ### Check who is hosting the group

   Look for a Peer Host whose lived experience matches the topic. On ShareWell, the host of each group is shown when you book, along with their background and the kind of conversation they tend to lead.
3. 3

   ### Look for a small group size

   Big groups feel like webinars. Small groups feel like conversation. ShareWell groups are intentionally small so everyone gets space to participate.
4. 4

   ### Pick a time you can actually keep

   Support is something you build over weeks, not a one-time visit. Most ShareWell groups recur on the same day and time, so you can come back to the same room and the same people once you find one that fits.
5. 5

   ### Try a few before you settle in

results.title: Online Support Groups | HeyPeers
results.content:
hey peers logo

# Find Online Support Groups

## Join online support groups where understanding and support lead to personal empowerment.

HeyPeers offers over 1,000 free support groups per month! Our groups are led by trained or certified peer specialists, ensuring you receive the highest quality of support for your mental well-being.

#### Grandma's Remedies

Grandma’s Remedies is an online group that promotes both mental and physical wellness through community connection and shared experiences. Together, we explore time-tested tips, supportive conversations, and everyday ...

organization Project Return Peer Support Network profile image
Yvonne Sandoval peer specialist profile image

#### Tattered Flower: A Sexual Abuse Recovery Group [...] Support groups are open to anyone looking for support. They often focus on specific topics such as depression, anxiety, family issues, or grief. It's important to find a group that feels right for you. If the first group you join doesn't meet your needs, don't hesitate to try another one.

#### Why use HeyPeers for Support Groups? [...] Support groups offer a unique opportunity to connect with others who share similar experiences. They help reduce isolation and loneliness, provide a sense of community, and offer practical advice and support. Here are some key benefits of joining a support group:

#### Who Should Use Support Groups? Support groups are open to anyone looking for support. They often focus on specific topics such as depression, anxiety, family issues, or grief. It's important to find a group that feels right for you. If the first group you join doesn't meet your needs, don't hesitate to try another one. ---

Visit the Site

Emotions Anonymous is an international fellowship of people who desire to have a better sense of emotional well-being. EA members have in personand online weekly meetingsavailable in more than 30 countries with 600 active groups worldwide. The EA is nonprofessional and can be a complement to therapy

Visit the Site

The Tribe Wellness Community offers free, online peer support groups offering members facing mental health challenges and/or difficult family dynamics a safe place to connect. Support groups include Addiction, Anxiety, Depression, HIV/AIDS, LGBT, Marriage/Family, OCD, and Teens.

results.title: Virtual Peer Support Groups | Advocates
results.content:
Peer meeting that is open topic to help start off the day!

#### Afternoon Chat & Support: 4:00PM–5:00PM EST

General peer meeting for those looking for support or a space to chat with others.

### Wednesday

#### Natural Healing & Living with Illness: 1:00 - 2:00 PM EST

A space to talk about alternative healing methods - as well as living with chronic health ailments and pain. Connect with others to know you're not alone in symptom management and explore possible alternative care methods.

#### Withdrawing from Psychiatric Medications: 4:00PM–5:00PM EST

A peer meeting for those who have, are currently or are considering withdrawing from prescribed medications. Also, a safe space for those managing long term withdrawal from medications.

### Thursday [...] ### Thursday

#### Afternoon Peer Support: 2:00PM–3:00PM EST - Group Currently On Hold Until Future Date

General support guests who are looking for supports or social connections.

#### Alternate Perceptions: A Hearing Voices Network Group: 3:00PM–4:30PM EST

A space for people whose perceptions of reality may not fit into the mainstream perspective. Open, but not limited to those who may see, hear, feel or perceive things that others around them may not. All interpretations of these experiences (medical, spiritual, religious or scientific) are welcome.

### Saturday

#### Weekend Peer Support: 4:00PM–5:00PM EST

Weekend peer meeting for those who are looking for supports, resources, connections or just someone to talk with.

Home

## Additional Websites [...] ### Important Information

## Schedule

Any group changes or cancellations will be posted on this page. Check back regularly for updates!

### Monday

#### General Support: 12:00PM–1:00PM EST

A peer meeting group that is open topic. Whether you are struggling with specific issues or are looking for an opportunity to widen your social circle - this meeting is a nice space to connect with others.

#### Alternatives to Suicide: 4:00PM–5:30PM EST

Peer meeting for those who have lived experience with suicide, suicidal ideation, attempts or have been affected by suicide. We strive to provide an atmosphere free of stigma, clinical repercussions or observation.

### Tuesday

#### Coffee & Conversation: 9:30AM–10:30AM EST

Peer meeting that is open topic to help start off the day!
